base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_door_open — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Open doors — 4 directional variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Open doors — 4 directional variants; after key-use or boss-defeat
